top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UN BETWEEN 7.1 AND 8.5;  -- Assuming borderline range for Urea Nitrogen is typically 7.1-8.5 mmol/L

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UN BETWEEN 7.0 AND 8.5;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UN BETWEEN 7.1 AND 8.5;  -- Assuming borderline range for Urea Nitrogen is typically 7.1-8.5 mmol/L

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UN BETWEEN 7.0 AND 8.5;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday  
FROM Patient p  
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID  
WHERE l.UN >= 7.1 AND l.UN <= 8.5;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UN BETWEEN 7.1 AND 8.5;  -- Assuming borderline range for Urea Nitrogen is typically 7.1-8.5 mmol/L

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UN BETWEEN 7.0 AND 8.5;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday  
FROM Patient p  
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID  
WHERE l.UN >= 7.1 AND l.UN <= 8.5;
